entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC

[xule.otherTaxonomyLoadTime] Load taxonomy time 0:00:01.525881 from 'https://xbrl.sec.gov/ecd/2025/ecd-2025.xsd' - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\BERG_instance_2024_2025.xml

[xule.otherTaxonomyLoadTime] Load taxonomy time 0:00:00.081060 from 'https://xbrl.sec.gov/cyd/2025/cyd-2025.xsd' - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\BERG_instance_2024_2025.xml

[DQC.US.0047.7481] In the company's extension taxonomy the concept None includes us-gaap:NetCashProvidedByUsedInContinuingOperations as a summation-child. The concept us-gaap:NetCashProvidedByUsedInContinuingOperations should not appear as a child of NetCashProvidedByUsedInOperatingActivities because it does not have a balance type. Increase (Decrease) items without balance attributes are used in a roll forward and should not be used in the cash flow statement as they represent the impact on the balance sheet item which is the opposite of the impact on cash.
Rule Element Id:7481 Rule version: 29.0.2 - BERG_instance_2024_2025.xml 4268
